caption: A man with curly dark hair and a beard is seated on a stage, wearing a crisp white button-down shirt and a small headset microphone. The background is dark, accented by vibrant purple beams of light casting a glow across the scene. He is positioned behind a light-colored wooden desk or podium. Throughout the sequence, the man remains mostly stationary, looking slightly to his right with a neutral to attentive facial expression. His posture is relaxed, and he appears to be listening or preparing to speak. As the scene progresses, there is very little movement, though his gaze shifts slightly. In the final moments, a small portion of another person's hand enters the frame from the bottom right corner, suggesting an interaction with someone off-screen. No text, logos, or other equipment are visible.
